narrative:
Ward Twp township has 763 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.6%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.9 percentage points.
